problem id: 186ade13
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND SHR(7)

examples:
  11101111 -> 00000001
  01100000 -> 00000000
  00111001 -> 00000000
  00110101 -> 00000000
  10000101 -> 00000000
  00001011 -> 00000000
  01110011 -> 00000000
  10000100 -> 00000000

query: 00010011
predicted answer: 00000000
